feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model
feed.subtitle: ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Consume SOAP API within the same S4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am building a developer extension in S4HANA Cloud.  I need to consume a SOAP API for posting some data into S4H.  I can call this API from SAPUI5 to post but I am exploring the possibility of calling the API within S4H using RAP.  I am not sure how to do this.

Any help is appreciated as this will help me process volume data using the custom App.

Thanks,

Vijay

entry.title: UI adapt using SAP BAS
entry.content:
Hello,

I have an app developed using SAP Restful ABAP. Deployed it using sap BAS.

Its enabled for key user adaptation ( by setting FlexEnabled to 'true' in the manifest. json) using BAS.

And my user has role - FlexKeyUser.

But I still do not see the Adapt UI option for my app. 

what am I missing ?

Can you please let me know how to get Adapt UI feature enable for my app.

thanks

entry.title: S4HC - Consume Local events
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Context - S4HANA Cloud - Business Events 

I am trying to consume the Business events raised within S4HANA Cloud using RAP again within the same S4HANA Cloud system.  If the event is raised by a RAP object we can create an event consumer class.  If the event is raised by non-RAP object, is there a way to consume it locally, without using BTP.   

Example - Inbound Delivery - Changed Event - This is a non-RAP object and I am trying to do some follow on actions when an Inbound Delivery is changed.

 

Thanks,

Vijay

entry.title: SAP RAP annotation, how can I use virtual element to set position and labels as #hidden is possi
entry.content:
Hi 

In my RAP meta data annotation file, I tried in to write 

@ui :{

fieldGroup : [ { position: 110, hidden: #(H_BASEUNIT) , label: #(L_BASEUNIT) } ],

identification : [ { position: #(P_BASEUNIT) }]

}

Baseunit;

Added to consumsion view:

@ObjectModel.virtualElementCalculatedBy: 'ABAP:/GWM/CL_HIDE_FIELDS_PRODGLOB'

virtual P_BASEUNIT : abap.numc( 3 ),

 

@ObjectModel.virtualElementCalculatedBy: 'ABAP:/GWM/CL_HIDE_FIELDS_PRODGLOB'

virtual L_BASEUNIT : abap.char( 50 ),

And gives no error

I use V4

But when been executed I get

Application could not be started due to technical issues.

ABAP Runtime error 'ASSERTION_FAILED'

 

What type or why should is this not supported when hidden: #(H_BASEUNIT)  is working fine?

Br.

Anna

entry.title: How to send email the list report output as attachment in SAP RAP
entry.content:
Hi,

I am wondering a cleaner and better way of sending the list report output as attachment in email in SAP RAP. The problem is that user can filter out the result of list report from the filters in selection screen. So, suppose the BO returns 1000 material records without filter. If I filter with material, I get 20. So, I need a button - 'Send Email' upon clicking which, those 20 records must be sent in attachment of the email.

Below are the approaches I have in my mind, but none of them feel clean to me -

  1. Instance based action: We must select records to send as attachment. No customer would want that.
  2. Static action: We cannot get any filters in importing parameter of the action, so we would need to store filters or the filtered records in a staging table and write code in action to send the filtered records accordingly.
  3. Button adding with UI5: UI5 developer can fetch the filters and make use of them. Even if we add a button in UI5, it will need an OData service to pass the filters to the OData and the OData must be able to handle the importing parameters like passing selected materials as comma separated string and in the static parametric action, write logic to separate materials and process create the final record. Too much trouble for both front-end and back-end developer.

What else can we do? Why there is no way to get filters in a custom action the way we get in custom query provider class through IO_REQUEST?

entry.title: Common standard features not working in RAP OData V4 - S4 2022 FPS02
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm pretty new to RAP. We created a RAP-based app with a child entity and published it as an OData v4 UI binding. When previewing the service we noticed that a few standard features that work fine in a V2 binding are missing or do not work in the V4 binding. We even tried deploying the V4 binding, but the result is the same.

1. Missing back button(the small < icon on top left) on object pages. Also, notice that the title 'Invoice' is missing in V4

V2: 

V4: 

2. Missing table variant selection on child entity table

V2:

V4:

3. Error when navigating back (clicking on the parent entity) from the object page of the child entity. Also, notice the missing back button in V4.

V2:
/sap/bc/adt/businessservices/odatav2/feap?feapParams=nZ%5Dsi%5Ds%5Dbjc%5DWYscF77%5D%C2%82%C2%8A%C2%83%7Dwy77%C2%88%C2%83s%5D%C2%82%C2%8A%C2%83%7Dwy%5D%C2%88y%C2%81%C2%8777%5D%C2%82%C2%8A%C2%83%7Dwy%5D%C2%88y%C2%81%C2%8777nZ%5Dsi%5Ds%5Dbjc%5DWYscFsjUb77DDDE&sap-ui-xx-viewCache=false&sap-ui-language=EN&sap-client=200#/Invoice(InvUUID=guid'fbb22573-8615-1edf-858a-5b585fd1058e',IsActiveEntity=true)

V4:

/sap/bc/adt/businessservices/odatav4/Invoice(InvUUID=fbb22573-8615-1edf-858a-5b585fd1058e,IsActiveEntity=true)?restoreHistory=true

Are these known issues with V4? If not am I missing any required annotations in the MDE file? I assume not since the same MDE works fine when using OData V2. Kindly guide.

@Andre_Fischer @Ramjee_korada 

Regards,

Saurabh

entry.title: SAP RAP - Trigger determination on save without field changes
entry.content:
Hi,

I've a RAP-based app - Managed, Draft enabled.

I've a determination at the parent entity level

determination updateInvoice on save { create; update; }

So I expect the determination to trigger on save whenever I hit save in the edit mode. The problem is the determination only triggers if I update/change the value of at least one field before hitting save.

I would like to have the determination trigger on save irrespective of whether I update any fields or not. How can I achieve that? Is there a way I can insert a dummy entity update somewhere after the user hits save to force-trigger the determination?

Regards,

Saurabh

entry.title: Consume ODATA v4 API within the same S4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Experts, 

I am trying to consume an ODATA v4.0 standard SAP API within the same S4HANA Cloud system.  I followed the instructions as per the SAP Help.

I created a proxy, outbound services, service consumption model, communication scenarios etc.  I created the communication arrangement and able to check connection successfully in the arrangement.

 I am using the code generated in the service consumption model.  When I tried to use the proxy in the ABAP code in the ADT, I am getting an error :

The remote service has raised a Client Error '404': 'Not Found'

 

Please help to consume this service - either using Local Proxy class or Remote Proxy class. 

Thanks,

Vijay

entry.title: RAP - Create mandatory fields Popup
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I have a managed RAP app and when I mark fields as mandatory, a popup with exactly these fields opens when I create it. After the popup, I get to the object page as usual and can enter the other fields.

Can I switch off this pop-up? I think it only came with oData V4.
It would be even better if I could influence which mandatory fields are in this popup and which are not. The reason is, I have several mandatory fields but they are all split across different sections in the object page. It would only be important to enter the first two via the popup right from the start.

For Example:

I have marked several fields as mandatory, but only the first two are used in the popup.

regards 

Lars

entry.title: Annotation to add Parameters for Intent Based Navigation in SAP RAP Development
entry.content: I have a CDS view with GUID as Key field. GUID is hidden from the User and Annotation is added to the corresponding Description to navigate to another application using Intent Based Navigation. But since GUID is hidden, Navigation is routing to the initial List page of the target application instead of particular Object page based on the GUID from the Source application. Is there any annotation to maintain the Parameters for the Navigation.

entry.title: Call a RFC in ABAP RAP save sequence
entry.content:
Hello All, Hello @Andre_Fischer 

Does anyone know if it is possible to call an RFC (using a destination) in the RAP save sequence to persist data in another SAP system?

I tried to call an RFC in the additional_save or save_modified of (un)managed RAP BO, but in all scenarios, the system generates a short dump. Calling a function module using a destination is not allowed as it triggers an implicit commit, which is forbidden.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: RAP BO is ignoring CDS access controls of child entit...
entry.content:
Hi bdrv,

I am also facing same issue what did you done ?

Venkatesh.

entry.title: How to add new fields into line item for an Manage sales order app in s/4 hana
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

Greetings,

For one of requirement, I need to add new fields into Line Items of SAP Manage sales order app.
May I know how do I achieve this either using developer extensibility or classic extensibility.?

if developer extensibility I tried adding new fields they are placing at custom fields tab, but I need those fields into line-Item table.

 

Regards,
Hiriyappa

entry.title: "Invalid key predicate" issue in RAP actions with optional date/time inputs
entry.content:
Hi all

when I create a RAP action and have an optional date/time field, regardless if it's hidden or not, if the user doesn't enter a date/time, the system responds with "Invalid key predicate". This is not a key field, but merely a parameter of the action. It's used from a Fiori app, and I can see the date being sent as "null". If I call it as an API omitting the date it's not an issue, only in Fiori.

Any idea what's causing this?

Thank you

entry.title: Negation in annotation @ui.hidden
entry.content:
Hi,

I tried adding the annotation UI.Hidden. This is working great.

But I need the negated value of the property 'TextEvaluat'. I found this:

But this does not work. Does anyone know how to negate a property?

entry.title: Add subtotal in RAP unmanaged query
entry.content:
Hi,

I have been doing some research on how to do this. I saw that this is very implement with managed query (via CDS views) using aggregate CDS annotations (only for oData v2 read-only apps).

https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-rap/annotating-aggregate-functions-in-cds

However, it doesn't seem to be working when I do the same thing via an unmanaged query. I have also tried playing around with the UI.presentationvariant annotations but no luck, it is also working only for managed queries.

I have also tried implementing the logic from the link below in my unmanaged query provider class, but there seems to be a problem and is resulting to a dump.

https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-rap/implementing-aggregations-in-unmanaged-query

The dump is caused by the incorrect select query.

 

 SELECT (lv_req_elements) FROM /dmo/travel

 WHERE (lv_sql_filter)

 GROUP BY (lv_grouping)

 ORDER BY (lv_sort_string)

 INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE @lt_travel_response

 OFFSET @lv_offset UP TO @lv_max_rows ROWS.

 

The LV_REQ_ELEMENTS variable from io_request->get_requested_elements( ) only contains the BOOKING_FEE field.

The LV_GROUPING variable from io_request->get_aggregation( )->get_grouped_elements( ) is empty even though I specified the groupBy annotation in the PresentationVariant.

The LV_SORT_STRING variable from io_request->get_sort_elements( ) is also empty. 

Does anybody know whether the @Aggregation.Default and presentationVariant is released for unmanaged query oData v2? 

    presentationVariant: [{
        sortOrder: [{
            by: 'Agency_ID',
            direction: #ASC
        }],
       groupBy : [ 'Agency_ID' ],
       totalBy : [ 'Agency_ID' ],
       total : [ 'Booking_Fee' ],
        visualizations: [{
            type: #AS_LINEITEM
        }]
    }]

@Andre_Fischer , just wondering if you have any thoughts on this? Thanks!

entry.title: Subtotal not being displayed in the fiori app created from SAP BAS
entry.content:
Hi,

I noticed that when I enabled the aggregation for my CDS view, the subtotals and grouping are being displayed properly in the preview app from ADT.

However, when I created the app from SAP BAS, the subtotals/grouping are not displayed/applied by default. Are there any extra steps to achieve this? Am I supposed to select the analytical list template instead of the list page template, even though I don't need the charts?

@Andre_Fischer, any thoughts on this? Thanks!

entry.title: Conversion Routine in AMDP for MATERIAL (MATNR)
entry.content:
Hi Team,

How can we use 'CONVERSION_EXIT_MATN1_INPUT'  in AMDP, where we need to convert Material No, into internal formant ? we have to avoid loop

entry.title: RAP: Dynamic Fieldgroup Labels
entry.content:
Hello Community,

Is it possible to dynamically adjust the labels of sections and field groups?

So far I have tried it with a virtual element and the adaptation of a char within the ABAP class. But without result.

@ObjectModel.virtualElementCalculatedBy: 'ABAP:ZCL_SECTION'
virtual SectionLabel   :abap.char( 15 ),
{
  parentId   : 'TestData',
  type       : #FIELDGROUP_REFERENCE,
  targetQualifier: 'Test',
  label      : #( SectionLabel )
},

Have I overlooked something or is it basically not possible?

regards

Lars

entry.title: SAP RAP Web API - Modify response body
entry.content:
Hi,

We've exposed a RAP service as an OData V4 Web API. It works as expected. Just that the default response of the POST call contains all the fields of the entity and the child entity when the request is successful. Is there a way to control/modify the response body(delete certain fields/send a generic response) before sending it to the consumer? Note that is a managed RAP BO with unmanaged save. The consumer triggers a create request, data is persisted in a custom DB table in the unmanaged save sequence and the control returns to the RAP framework for response generation.

Current default sample response:

Expected Response:
{ "Success" } or no response at all with HTTP status 200 would also work.

Any suggestions?
